{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Lifeseed Elixir
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Lifeseed Elixir]] is a type of elixir.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12">''Underlord'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
